meta.title: Jessica Au Appointed CFO | Weatherhaven
meta.description: Jessica Au appointed Chief Financial Officer.

hero.title: Jessica Au Appointed Weatherhaven Group CFO
hero.subtitle: Weatherhaven is pleased to announce the appointment of Jessica Au as Chief Financial Officer.

body: Weatherhaven is pleased to announce that Jessica Au has been appointed Chief Financial Officer of Weatherhaven Global Resources Ltd.
Jessica joined Weatherhaven in 2018 and has served in progressively senior finance roles. Prior to Weatherhaven, she was with PwC and holds a degree from the University of British Columbia.

sidebar.name: James Kirk
sidebar.title: Chief Operating Officer
sidebar.bio: 17 years of experience as a Mechanical Engineer leading global operations.
